title: Early Warning System for Step Limits
description: The session ended abruptly due to reaching max_steps, leaving a task pending. This indicates a lack of proactive monitoring of the remaining step budget relative to the task complexity.
evidence: session ended without final answer (max_steps reached)
proposed_change: Add a recovery strategy in the system prompt or operational guidelines: 'When current_step > 70% of max_steps and task is not near completion, the agent must explicitly state the remaining budget and provide a partial progress report + handoff state for the next session to ensure no work is lost.'

fitness.notes: Aligns with the need for reliable session handoffs and the stability of the project.
